case_title: THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TREASURER VS. JAMES RUIZ

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-08-2013 - JUDGMENT.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,524.00 FILED BY THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT RUIZ, JAMES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-08-2013 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RUIZ, JAMES $3,524.00 PRINCIPAL, $45.96 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,569.96 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT RUIZ, JAMES
